$schema_comment: Versions currently in use in this project. Update by hand when you bump dependencies. Agents read this before writing code so they target compatible patterns.
notes: All version pins are major-version ranges. Lockfile (package-lock.json) is the precise authority.
Reconciled 2026-04-25 with what npm create vite@latest actually installed — Vite 8, TS 6, Vitest 4, fast-check 4, ESLint 10 are current upstream majors.
Bump policies: minors silently when modernizing, majors only via the upgrade workflow with version-notes.md entries.
When a major bump is needed, document required code changes in version-notes.md before bumping.
